title: FindThy system development
summary: Brand and experience architecture for a selective discovery agency, including positioning, language and cultural case structures.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on executable digital behaviour implemented in a website, application, interface or connected software system.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on meaning, recognition, identity, visual language or the designed human experience.
